content: The famous line "Frankly, my dear, I don't give a damn" was spoken by Clark Gable as Rhett Butler to Vivien Leigh's Scarlett O'Hara in the classic 1939 film "Gone with the Wind." This iconic quote is considered one of the most memorable lines in cinema history.
raw_content: The famous line "Frankly, my dear, I don't give a damn" was spoken by Clark Gable as Rhett Butler to Vivien Leigh's Scarlett O'Hara in the classic 1939 film "Gone with the Wind." This iconic quote is considered one of the most memorable lines in cinema history.
